title: Muhammad Ali Congressional Gold Medal Act
short_title: Muhammad Ali Congressional Gold Medal Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
crs_summary: Muhammad Ali Congressional Gold Medal Act This bill provides for the posthumous award of a Congressional Gold Medal to Muhammad Ali. There is authorized to be charged against the U.S. Mint Public Enterprise Fund such amounts as may be necessary to pay for the costs of the medals struck under this bill. Sums received from the sale of duplicate bronze medals authorized by this bill shall be deposited into that fund.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
